verdict_legend.train-ready: Accepted; included in SFT training set.
verdict_legend.bible-cap-overflow: Excluded: passed quality but exceeded fixed-point Bible cap (≤30% of final train tokens).
verdict_legend.bible-quality-reject: Excluded: failed quality gate (alignment_confidence_tier=reject) independent of cap.
verdict_legend.hk-legal-cap-overflow: Excluded: passed hk1897-legal-clean-v1 filter but exceeded fixed-point HK legal-register cap (≤15%).
verdict_legend.hk-quality-reject: Excluded: failed hk1897 quality filters (ratio / length bounds).
verdict_legend.andrews-dictionary-fragment-rejected: Rejected under Rusty §1.1: dictionary-fragment SFT unsuitable; all 1,194 rows fail minimum token count.
verdict_legend.hooilina-para-superseded-excluded: Excluded: Hoʻoilina paragraph/section-level row superseded by sentence-level pipeline and held out of this training cut.
verdict_legend.hooilina-sentence-quality-reject: Excluded: Hoʻoilina sentence-level paragraph pair failed promotion gate (tokens/ratio/dedup).
verdict_legend.kaikki-quality-reject: Excluded: Kaikki/Wiktionary entry failed stage2 quality gate.
verdict_legend.tatoeba-quality-reject: Excluded: Tatoeba pair failed stage2 quality gate.
verdict_legend.phrase-book-1881-quality-reject: Excluded: Bishop 1881 Hawaiian Phrase Book row failed phrase-book-1881-clean-v1 promotion gate (alignment type / token band / ratio / nonhaw / dedup).
verdict_legend.opus-qed-language-mismatch-reject: Excluded: OPUS QED haw slice is language-mislabeled, not en↔haw bitext.
verdict_legend.opus-ubuntu-misaligned-reject: Excluded: OPUS Ubuntu rows are row-misaligned / loan-heavy software strings.
verdict_legend.opus-tatoeba-upstream-duplicate: Excluded: OPUS-Tatoeba duplicates the upstream Tatoeba lane after normalized-text dedup.
verdict_legend.opus-wikimedia-language-reject: Excluded: OPUS-wikimedia row failed language sanity checks.
verdict_legend.opus-wikimedia-quality-heldout: Excluded: OPUS-wikimedia row did not pass the conservative source-line alignment promotion gate.
verdict_legend.opus-corpus-policy-heldout: Excluded: OPUS corpus not covered by an accepted Stage-2 policy.
verdict_legend.wikimedia-cx-rights-alignment-heldout: Excluded: Wikimedia CX partial-stub rows lack hard train clearance for alignment + attribution.
verdict_legend.weblate-software-l10n-policy-heldout: Excluded: Weblate software-l10n rows lack approved register cap / context-quality gate for this cut.
